lastReleaseMessage: v0.13.0: Plaid Phase 2 webhook relay (Cloudflare Worker, metadata-only per D-010) + scheduled localhost drain; SQLCipher at-rest (Wave 6) keyed from OS keystore; D-008..D-012 promoted into DECISIONS.md.

barRaise.topFinding: Third frozen day in a row. HEAD is still 310ef64 (v0.13.0, 2026-06-08); the tree is byte-identical to what the 06-09 bar-raise and the 06-09/06-10 canonical audits measured, so the code findings carry verbatim. The story has moved off the code and onto the loop meant to fix it: the canonical audit's auto-enqueued YaB items from the last three runs (including the locked-decision D-011 route fix) never reached the shared .work-queue.json, while the six items that did land are stale (06-05 to 06-07), one a P0 commit-now the 06-08 sprint already discharged but still marked pending. The result is a locked-decision violation in shipped code (server.ts:758 returns 400 where D-011 mandates 409) unfixed across multiple cycles because nothing downstream can see it. Verdict holds at needs-attention; the deteriorating axis is orchestration, not the product, and zero prior actions closed.
